identity.mission: Create the Harvey.ai of India. High density, professional, authoritative, 'War Room' aesthetic.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Swiss Style meets Senior Partner Memo.
Emotion First: The feeling of 'Competence' and 'Precision'.
Content is King: The AI response is the product. Typography is the UI.
Density with Breathing Room: High information density managed by strict grids and whitespace.

rules: Legal citations MUST use IBM Plex Mono.
Use font-weight to create hierarchy, not just size.

layout.spacing_scale: Tailwind default but doubled for sections (py-24, py-32)

buttons.primary: bg-[#1A1A2E] text-white hover:bg-[#0D0D0D] rounded-sm px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all text-sm shadow-none
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-[#E2E8F0] text-[#0D0D0D] hover:bg-[#F8FAFC] rounded-sm px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all text-sm

inputs.style: bg-white border border-[#E2E8F0] rounded-sm focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#0D0D0D] focus:border-[#0D0D0D] transition-all placeholder:text-gray-400

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Only for sticky headers: backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80 border-b border-[#E2E8F0]

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Senior Partner Memo' style for AI responses: Structured, Dense, Monospace citations.
Use 'Inter' for UI and 'IBM Plex Mono' for data/code/legal citations.
Ensure the layout is dense but readable. Use 240px Sidebar.
Login page should be simple, professional, centered card on subtle grey bg.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc.
